On May 9, 2025, less than two months before the resolution deadline, Rippling announced a $450m Series G funding round at a $16.8B valuation. Alongside the round, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that there are "no immediate IPO plans" and that the company wants to reach profitability first. To provide liquidity in the meantime, Rippling carried out a $200m tender offer that Conrad said would become an "annual event". Given the extremeness of the time constraint (the deadline is July 1, 2025, a mere 40 days after the knowledge cutoff of May 22, 2025), and such a clear, definitive statement from the CEO ruling out an impending IPO, the probability of Rippling announcing an IPO or filing an S-1 before the deadline is exceptionally low.
